editOptions.title: Edit blueprint
editOptions.description: Change the existing values for this blueprint.

savingChanges.title: Saving changes
savingChanges.description: Please wait while your changes are saved...

downloadingBlueprint.title: Downloading blueprint
downloadingBlueprint.description: Please wait while the blueprint is download...

uploadingBlueprint.title: Uploading crop
uploadingBlueprint.description: Please wait while the crop is being uploaded, this can take a minute...

cropMadeSuccessfully.title: Crop generated
cropMadeSuccessfully.description: The crop has been successfully created and is now available as a new blueprint within this project.

deleteBlueprint.title: Delete blueprint
deleteBlueprint.description: This action cannot be undone. This will permanently delete the blueprint.

deletingBlueprint.title: Deleting blueprint
deletingBlueprint.description: Please wait while this blueprint is being deleted...

dialogCreateCrop.title: Creating crop
dialogCreateCrop.description: Complete the fields and upload your crop.

processingBlueprint.title: Processing blueprint...
processingBlueprint.description:
Your blueprint is being processed by AI.

You may continue using the application and will be notified once processing is complete.

deleteAreaDialog.title: Delete area "{{label}}"
deleteAreaDialog.description: You can undo this change later on the "Deleted areas" section down below the blueprint image.

confirmSaveArea.title: Save generated areas?
confirmSaveArea.description: Do you want to save the areas that the AI has made? You can edit or delete them individualy, this areas will replce the once already existing ones if there was.

saveAreas.title: Saving areas...
saveAreas.description: Please wait while this areas are being saved...

selectAiModels.title: Select AI processing model
selectAiModels.description: Select the models the AI will use to process the blueprint for each specialty assign.
